data.name: UnexpectedServerError
data.value: Unexpected server error

data.name: UnexpectedErrorProcessingRequest
data.value: An unexpected error occurred while processing your request.

data.name: ResourceNotFound
data.value: Resource not found

data.name: OperationCancelled
data.value: Operation was cancelled

data.name: InvalidRequest
data.value: Invalid request

data.name: Unauthorized
data.value: Unauthorized

data.name: Forbidden
data.value: Forbidden

data.name: ValidationFailed
data.value: Validation failed

data.name: NutritionLogEntryNotFoundTitle
data.value: Nutrition log entry not found

data.name: NutritionLogEntryNotFound
data.value: The requested nutrition log entry does not exist.

data.name: NutritionLogEntryUnauthorized
data.value: You are not allowed to modify this nutrition log entry.

data.name: NutritionLogEntryInvalidQuantity
data.value: The provided quantity is invalid.

data.name: NutritionLogEntryDeletedTitle
data.value: Nutrition log entry not found

data.name: NutritionLogEntryDeleteUnauthorized
data.value: You are not allowed to delete this nutrition log entry.

data.name: UnexpectedError
data.value: An unexpected error occurred.

data.name: ActivityLogNotFoundTitle
data.value: Activity log not found

data.name: ActivityLogNotFound
data.value: The requested activity log entry does not exist.

data.name: ActivityLogDeleteNotOwner
data.value: You are not allowed to delete this activity log entry.

data.name: AuthenticationRequired
data.value: Authentication is required to access this resource.

data.name: InvalidEmail
data.value: The email address format is not valid.

data.name: WeakPassword
data.value: The password does not meet the security requirements: at least 8 characters, including an uppercase letter, a lowercase letter, a digit and a special character.

data.name: EmailAlreadyTaken
data.value: An account with this email address already exists.

data.name: InvalidCredentials
data.value: The email or password is incorrect.

data.name: UserNotFound
data.value: No account was found for the provided identifier.

data.name: SessionNotFound
data.value: The requested session does not exist.

data.name: InvalidProfileData
data.value: The provided profile data is not valid.

data.name: InvalidGoal
data.value: The selected health goal is not valid.

data.name: PremiumRequired
data.value: This feature requires an active premium subscription.

data.name: InvalidDateRange
data.value: The provided date range is not valid.
